metadata.description: ERPNext/Frappe plugins for Claude Code — skills, commands, agents, and a live MCP connection to your ERPNext instance.

plugins.name: erpnext-toolkit
plugins.description: All-in-one ERPNext/Frappe toolkit: skills for API integration, DocType development, low-code customization, reports and business workflows; /erp-query, /erp-doctype, /erp-report, /erp-fix commands; erpnext-developer and erpnext-analyst agents; and an MCP connection to your live ERPNext instance.
